title: Asset Collection
description: A named group of related assets — e.g. a model railway collection, vinyl record library, or art portfolio. Lets families and dealers understand which items belong together and should be considered as a set.

id.description: Unique identifier for this asset collection

estateId.description: The estate this collection belongs to

description.description: Context for family members and dealers about the collection's scope, provenance, or significance
examples: OO gauge collection started in 1985, mostly Hornby with some Lima coaches. Layout stored in the loft at Oakfield Road.

category.$comment: Broad category for the collection. Use 'other' for niche collections (e.g. vintage typewriters, fountain pens). Individual assets within the collection may have more specific categories.
category.description: The primary category of items in this collection

estimatedValue.description: Estimated total value of the collection as a whole

valuationSource.$comment: self_estimated = owner's own guess. dealer_valuation = assessed by a specialist dealer. auction_estimate = provided by an auction house. insurance_value = the insured replacement value.
valuationSource.description: How the estimated value was determined

valuationDate.description: Date the valuation was performed or last updated

disposalWishes.description: Free-text guidance from the testator about what should happen to this collection — keep together, sell at auction, donate to a museum, etc.
examples: Keep together if possible. Contact Dave at Manchester Model Railway Club — he knows the right dealers. Do not sell on eBay individually.

notes.description: Any additional notes about this collection
examples: Insurance policy with Hiscox, ref HX-2024-1234. Photos in Google Drive folder 'Railway Collection'.

images.description: Overview photographs and videos of the collection as a whole — the display, the storage, the scale of the collection.
